evals.name: network-activation-setup
evals.prompt: Make my plugin support multisite network activation and run table setup on every site.
evals.expected_output: register_activation_hook checks $network_wide. If true: get_sites() loop with switch_to_blog()/my_plugin_create_tables()/restore_current_blog() wrapped in try/finally. Hook wp_initialize_site to run setup on new sites. Declare network-wide support.

evals.name: fix-settings-leak
evals.prompt: My plugin settings are leaking between sites on a multisite install — site A's settings appear on site B.
evals.expected_output: Diagnose: likely using get_site_option() instead of get_option() for per-site data, or using switch_to_blog() without restore_current_blog(). Fix: use get_option/update_option inside correct blog context. Ensure all switch_to_blog() calls have restore_current_blog() in finally block. Test with 2 sites having different values.

evals.name: network-admin-settings-page
evals.prompt: Add a network admin settings page so super admins can configure global plugin defaults.
evals.expected_output: add_action('network_admin_menu') adds page with manage_network_options capability. Settings saved via network_admin_edit_{action} hook with check_admin_referer. Use update_site_option/get_site_option (wp_sitemeta table). Redirect back with updated=true. Add network_admin_plugin_action_links_ filter for Settings link.
